approvalSource: Steve approved the full-day Foundation green/main/audit/source sprint and explicitly prioritized preventing the 108-card branch pileup from happening again.
scopeSummary: Prove main, origin/main, served dashboard, served worker, current closeout truth, and side-branch routing agree before the sprint continues; dogfood the 108-card pileup as a failure unless merged or release-trained.
constraints: Do not build extractor/source feature work before this lock is green.
Do not launch parallel builders or hidden workers from this card.
Do not silently mix preserved side commits into Foundation main.
Do not run live extraction, provider probes, credential repair, Drive mutation, sends, or external writes.
